headline: Medtronic Neurosurgery Imaging Tie Up May Influence Digital Surgery Valuation
summary: GE HealthCare and Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) have launched a digital integration between the bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound and the Stealth AXiS surgical navigation system. The integration is now commercially available and is designed to support cranial neurosurgery with real-time imaging during procedures. This launch connects Medtronic's navigation and robotics platforms with GE HealthCare's imaging into a unified workflow in the operating room. For you as an investor, this update sits at...
